message:
🐛 Fix TS2352 cast error: use double-cast via unknown for isError check (#11089)

The ChatStreamPayload → Record<string, unknown> cast introduced in #11086
is not allowed by TypeScript's type checker (TS2352). Fix by casting through
'unknown' first: (chatPayload as unknown as Record<string, unknown>).isError

Applies to both useMissions.tsx and useMissions.provider.tsx.

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
